rationale.R1.2: The agent output identifies multiple load-bearing inconsistencies and proposes minimal repairs, demonstrating a thorough engagement with the argument chain.
rationale.RX.1: The agent flags uncertainty for some claims but does not mark confidence for each recommendation, falling short of comprehensive disclosure.
rationale.RX.3: The output is mostly within scope with one minor drift, addressing the requested review while touching on additional minor issues.
rationale.RX.4: The output avoids introducing new errors and identifies harmful patterns in the original text, ensuring no regressions.
rationale.RX.5: The agent does not annotate non-cosmetic changes with sources or reasons, failing to meet traceability standards.
